features: 【Package & Size】Set of 10pcs Christmas artificial pine picks, with red berries, pine needle branches, and pine cones. Length: 20cm / 7.87inch
【High-Quality Material】 Artificial holly berry stems are made of foam balls, plastic and wire, light and durable, environmental and reusable

【Realistic & Natural Looking】Each Christmas berry branch is decorated with bright plump berries, green pine leaves branches and a pine cone, all covered by white snow, and a hemp rope bowknot, beautiful and charming, simple yet elegant, and just the right amount of Christmassy

【Wide Applications】Christmas berry picks are beautiful festive decor, ideal for embellishing weddings, cards, Christmas present boxes, gift bags, Christmas garland or wreath, Xmas tree, crafts work. Can also used for making bouquets, centerpieces, photo props etc.
【100% Satisfaction Guarantee】Customers' satisfaction experience is our top priority. If you are not satisfied with our product, contact us any time
